zh.lifeSummary: 當John Maultbye於大約1510年出生在英國英格蘭時，他的父親William De Maltbie71歲，母親Elizabeth Clifford-12歲。他於大約1529年與Margaret Burr在英國英格蘭結婚。他們至少是5個兒子和3個女兒的父母。他去世於1557年3月12日在英國諾廷加姆爾厄普頓享年48歲。

nameMeanings.name: Maultbye
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of Family Names in Britain and Ireland © University of the West of England 2016

variants.name: Maltby
meanings: English: habitational name from either of two places called Maltby (South Yorkshire, Lincolnshire) or Maltby le Marsh (Lincolnshire); possibly occasionally from Maltby (North Yorkshire) or Mautby (Norfolk). The placenames derive from the Old Norse personal name Malti + Old Norse bȳ ‘farmstead, village’.

nameMeanings.name: John
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: As a boy's name this represents a revival of Middle English Jan, a by‐form of John , or an adoption of the common European form with this spelling. As a girl's name it is a short form of names such as Janet and Janice .

historicEvents.title: Book of Common Prayer
historicEvents.description: Book of Common Prayer, a product of the English Reformation, was published in 1549 for assistance in the administration of the sacraments and other rites and ceremonies of the church according to the use of the Church of England. The book outlined morning, evening, and communion prayers and orders for baptism and marriage, thus making England a truly Protestant state.

en.lifeSummary: When John Maultbye was born about 1510, in England, United Kingdom, his father, William De Maltbie, was 71 and his mother, Elizabeth Clifford, was -12. He married Margaret Burr about 1529, in England, United Kingdom. They were the parents of at least 5 sons and 3 daughters. He died on 12 March 1557, in Upton, Nottinghamshire, England, at the age of 48.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque John Maultbye est né environ 1510, à Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, son père, William De Maltbie, avait 71 ans et sa mère, Elizabeth Clifford, avait -12 ans. Il a épousé Margaret Burr environ 1529, à Angleterre, Royaume-Uni. Ils ont eu au moins 5 fils et 3 filles. Il est décédé le 12 mars 1557, à Upton, Nottinghamshire, Angleterre, à l’âge de 48 ans.

Er hat um 1529 in England, United Kingdom Margaret Burr geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 5 Söhne und 3 Töchter. Er starb am 12. März 1557 im Alter von 48 Jahren in Upton, Nottinghamshire, England.

it.lifeSummary: Quando John Maultbye è nato il circa 1510 nel Inghilterra, Regno Unito, il suo padre, William De Maltbie, aveva 71 anni e il suo madre, Elizabeth Clifford, aveva -12 anni. ko.lifeSummary: John Maultbye(이)가 대략 1510년 영국 잉글랜드에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 William De Maltbie(은)는 71세였고, 그의 어머니 Elizabeth Clifford(은)는 -12세였다. 그는 대략 1529년 영국 잉글랜드에서 Margaret Burr(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 다섯 명의 아들과 세 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1557년 3월 12일 영국 노틴그함실르 업턴에서 48세의 나이로 사망했다.
